# Scenario: protocol-mismatch-error-plain
# Invocation: any bakudo run that requires protocol v3 (e.g. an assistant-turn task kind)
#             against an older abox binary that reports capability set v1 only.
# Rule: Phase 6 Workstream "Worker Capability Probe Fallback":
#   - probe succeeds, worker advertises protocols [1]
#   - host requires protocol v3 for this task kind
#   - WorkerProtocolMismatchError fires BEFORE dispatch
#   - Exit code: 4 (protocol mismatch / incompatible environment)
#   - Stable error code string: "worker_protocol_mismatch"
# plainRenderer: no ANSI. Error goes to stderr in real runs; fixture shows the exact text body.

Bakudo: Probing abox capabilities...
Bakudo: abox reports protocol versions [1]; host needs protocol 3 for this task kind.

Error: worker_protocol_mismatch
  Host protocol v3 is not supported by the worker.

Details:
  hostProtocol:    3
  workerProtocols: [1]
  taskKind:        assistant_turn
  aboxPath:        /home/al/git/bakudo-abox/abox/target/release/abox
  aboxVersion:     0.8.3
  probeEventId:    evt_01HXYZPROBE0FAIL

Next steps:
  1. Upgrade abox to a build that advertises protocol 3.
       just rebuild-rootfs && cargo build --release -p abox
  2. Or run with `--task-kind explicit_command` to fall back to protocol v1 semantics.
  3. Run `bakudo doctor` to see the full capability report.

Exit code: 4
